name_and_address.description: Combined name and address of the assignor (current owner transferring the mark). Two-line free-form widget where both lines bind to the same canonical key.

entity_type.description: Mutually-exclusive enum of the assignor's legal form: 'individual' | 'general_partnership' | 'limited_partnership' | 'corporation' | 'association' | 'union' | 'other' (with explanation). Mirrors mark.applicant.entity_type from MARK_mark1.

jurisdiction_of_organization.description: Home jurisdiction (state) of the assignor entity. Required when assignor.entity_type implies a registered entity (corporation, LP, LLC, LLP, or 'other' resolving to such).

date_of_organization.description: Date assignor entity was incorporated/organized in its home jurisdiction.

printed_name_and_capacity.description: Printed name and capacity of the natural person signing for the assignor. Bound to two widgets — the Whereas-clause recital (mark4Nineteen) and the Signature-line (mark4Twentytwo) — both filled with the same value.

date_signed.description: Date the assignor signed the assignment (distinct from mark.assignment.date_of_transfer, which is the legal effective date).

date_of_transfer.description: Date the mark was legally sold/assigned/transferred per the assignor's recital ('said mark has been sold, assigned and transferred on (date)').

name_and_address.description: Combined name and address of the assignee (new owner receiving the mark). Two-line free-form widget where both lines bind to the same canonical key.

entity_type.description: Mutually-exclusive enum of the assignee's legal form (same enum values as mark.assignor.entity_type).

jurisdiction_of_organization.description: Home jurisdiction (state) of the assignee entity.

date_of_organization.description: Date assignee entity was incorporated/organized in its home jurisdiction.

date_signed.description: Date the assignee signed/accepted the assignment.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
